riskFallback.low: Only low-risk signals are documented, but start with a narrow trial.
riskFallback.medium: Medium risk. Review critical outputs before formal adoption.
riskFallback.high: High-risk tool. Do not use in production without clear audit evidence and boundaries.

nextStepFallback.curated: Open the getting-started guide below and walk through it first.
nextStepFallback.listed: Check the official docs and pricing before you commit.
nextStepFallback.native: Review the audit report and on-chain evidence before renting.

scenarios.title: Scenario fit
scenarios.noUnfit: No explicit unfit scenarios documented yet.

risk.title: Risks & mitigation
risk.mitigationFallback: Pilot in a sandbox before expanding the scope.

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.missing: No platform-maintained guide yet — see official resources below.

trust.title: Trust evidence
trust.noChainEvidence: Not registered on-chain. Only content-layer evidence is available.

subtitle.native: Platform-native signals can be shown here, but transaction execution is not connected.
subtitle.curated: This catalog entry keeps official access separate from platform rental.

web2.configured: Use the configured order or fiat application endpoint.
